name: Buubuu
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 155; Episode 92

Buubuu is the captain of the Piggy Pirates of Arabasta. He made a grave mistake in attempting to steal from a port city in Arabasta which was under the protection of Crocodile, who used his Suna Suna no Mi to create a sandstorm to drain the water from his body and from the bodies of his crew. It is unknown if Buubuu survived, although it seems unlikely. His name roughly translates to "Oink Oink", and was revealed in Grand Data File: Blue.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
